ground_truth.title: Ceramic mug, earthy pottery mug handmade, US DDP
ground_truth.main_content:
IngridDebardCeramics

Item details

Highlights

Made by IngridDebardCeramics

Materials: Ceramic

Capacity: 13.5 fluid ounces

You can choose a color from the last picture

1- light green /brown clay(front picture)
2-light green / black clay
3- light blue /black clay
4- Green / black clay
5- raspberry red / black clay
6- black / black clay

You can write me the color on the note when ordering . Also you can contact me :)
You can also contact me if you want to buy any other mugs from my shop using the quantity discount, I'll help you to organize it .

This gorgeous two-tone stoneware mug has the perfective curve to nestle between your chilly fingers on a cold day. This stripey fellas are begging to be filled with something hot and piping, and look good doing it. Expecting company? Order more than one mug using the drop-down menu!
With their rustic visage and an all-around cozy vibe, this mug makes for a foolproof cottage or chalet warming gift.

I am making myself the clay of this mug and the color is sometimes a little bit red and sometimes a little more gray . In all the pictures you can see the all options of this mug .

if you want the mugs bigger or with an other request ,please contact me , I'll be happy I help you creating your best mugs set. Be aware that everyone will be a little different from each other.

If you don't choose a color , the color will be the front picture one

All mugs exist in other size ( 400 /600/800/1000 ml )
You can find them on my shop or contact me

Size : medium
Quantity : 400ml / 14oz*

care instructions:
dishwasher and oven safe

If you want more than one piece or an other size please contact me

Please be aware that handmade is a one of a kind work for each mug and sometimes colors or shape can be a little bit different from the picture.
